message:
fix(web): use dynamic viewport height for iOS Safari compatibility

- Use 100dvh instead of 100vh for proper iOS Safari address bar handling
- Add overscroll-contain and WebkitOverflowScrolling for smooth mobile scroll
- Apply to DistillationViewer TOC and QuoteBankViewer scroll container
